sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on a sky blue dot - start with [37, 18]
predict(expect_change=True, note='Clicking sky blue dot might move a marker or trigger something')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 37, 'col': 18}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Nodes after click:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
